message:
fix(mvcc): align lifecycle.rs with Arc<HashMap> write_set_data

The core_types.rs change in c8aaf0c converted write_set_data from
HashMap to Arc<HashMap>, but lifecycle.rs was not updated, causing
compile failures:

- Savepoint::write_set_snapshot: HashMap → Arc<HashMap>
- .insert() calls → Arc::make_mut(&mut ...).insert()
- clone_from(&snapshot) → = snapshot.clone()

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
